hooks.command: bash -c 'REPO_ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"; LOG_FILE="$REPO_ROOT/.ai/logs/skill-routing-$(date -u +%Y-%m-%d).jsonl"; mkdir -p "$(dirname "$LOG_FILE")"; TOOL_NAME="${CLAUDE_TOOL_NAME:-Edit}"; TOOL_INPUT="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT:-{}}"; RESULT=$(printf "%s" "$TOOL_INPUT" | bash "$REPO_ROOT/.ai/scripts/skill-route-from-tool.sh" 2>/dev/null || echo "{\"query\":\"\",\"results\":[]}"); TOP_SKILL=$(printf "%s" "$RESULT" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); r=d.get(\"results\",[]); print(r[0].get(\"name\",\"\") if r else \"\")" 2>/dev/null || echo ""); TOP_SCORE=$(printf "%s" "$RESULT" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); r=d.get(\"results\",[]); print(r[0].get(\"score\",0) if r else 0)" 2>/dev/null || echo "0"); TARGET=$(printf "%s" "$TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read()); print(d.get(\"file_path\",d.get(\"path\",\"unknown\")))" 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown"); QUERY=$(printf "%s" "$RESULT" | python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"query\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null || echo ""); printf "{\"ts\":\"%s\",\"tool\":\"%s\",\"target\":\"%s\",\"query_inferred\":\"%s\",\"top_skill\":\"%s\",\"score\":%s,\"blocked\":false}\n" "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)" "$TOOL_NAME" "$TARGET" "$QUERY" "$TOP_SKILL" "$TOP_SCORE" >> "$LOG_FILE"; exit 0'

bash -c 'REPO_ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"; OUTPUT="${CLAUDE_TOOL_OUTPUT:-}"; if [ ${#OUTPUT} -gt 4000 ]; then printf "%s" "$OUTPUT" | python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, \"$REPO_ROOT/.ai/lib\"); from smart_truncator import SmartTruncator; import os; t=SmartTruncator(); print(t.truncate(sys.stdin.read(), os.environ.get(\"CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT\",\"\"), 4000))" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; exit 0'
bash -c 'REPO_ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"; bash "$REPO_ROOT/.ai/scripts/session-bootstrap.sh" 2>/dev/null | head -20 || true; exit 0'
bash -c 'REPO_ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"; bash "$REPO_ROOT/.ai/scripts/context-budget-meter.sh" 2>/dev/null || true; exit 0'
bash -c 'REPO_ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"; bash "$REPO_ROOT/.ai/scripts/pre-compact-anchor.sh" 2>/dev/null || true; exit 0'
bash -c 'REPO_ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"; bash "$REPO_ROOT/.ai/scripts/session-handoff.sh" 2>/dev/null || true; exit 0'
